Authors and Citation

Authors

  • H. van de Beek. Author, maintainer.

  • P.A.J. Välitalo. Author.

  • L.B. Zwep. Author.

  • J.G.C. van Hasselt. Author.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

van de Beek H., Välitalo P.A.J., van Hasselt J.G.C., Zwep L.B. (2025). Aggregate data modelling: A fast implementation for fitting pharmacometrics models to summary-level data in R. Journal of Pharmacokinetics and Pharmacodynamics, 53(1), 3. https://doi.org/10.1007/s10928-025-10011-w

@Article{,
  title = {Aggregate data modelling: A fast implementation for fitting pharmacometrics models to summary-level data in R},
  author = {Hidde {van de Beek} and Pyry A. J. Välitalo and J. G. Coen {van Hasselt} and Laura B. Zwep},
  journal = {Journal of Pharmacokinetics and Pharmacodynamics},
  year = {2025},
  volume = {53},
  number = {1},
  pages = {3},
  doi = {10.1007/s10928-025-10011-w},
}

Välitalo P.A.J. (2021). Pharmacometric estimation methods for aggregate data, including data simulated from other pharmacometric models. Journal of Pharmacokinetics and Pharmacodynamics, 48(5), 623-638. https://doi.org/10.1007/s10928-021-09760-1

@Article{,
  title = {Pharmacometric estimation methods for aggregate data, including data simulated from other pharmacometric models},
  author = {Pyry Antti Juhana Välitalo},
  journal = {Journal of Pharmacokinetics and Pharmacodynamics},
  year = {2021},
  volume = {48},
  number = {5},
  pages = {623--638},
  doi = {10.1007/s10928-021-09760-1},
}
